meta.note: Two registers (formal, informal), each with 5 types. Register toggle swaps the active dataset. Three-card fold: 01 OPEN = greeting + purpose line; 02 BODY = 3 building lines (details/reason/request); 03 CLOSE = closing remark + sign-off. Each register carries its own shared pools (greetings, sign-offs, body connectors) so formal stays formal throughout and informal stays warm. Feature signposts carry _join. Types are letter/email PURPOSES.
